title.ko: 차량용 타이어; 타이어의 팽창; 타이어의 교환; 팽창가능한 탄성체에 밸브의 부착 일반; 타이어에 관한 장치 또는 부품
title.en: VEHICLE TYRES; TYRE INFLATION; TYRE CHANGING; CONNECTING VALVES TO INFLATABLE ELASTIC BODIES IN GENERAL; DEVICES OR ARRANGEMENTS RELATED TO TYRES

definition.ko: 타이어 재료에 특징이 있는 것 B60C1/00 단면에 특징이 있는 것 B60C3/00 일반적 구조 B60C5/00, B60C7/00, B60C19/00 부품; 보강재; 트레드; 벽; 비이드; 다른 부품 B60C9/00; 11/00; 13/00; 15/00; 19/00 특수한 장치 B60C17/00, B60C27/00 설치, 팽창 팽창용 장치, 압력 또는 온도제어 B60C23/00, B60C29/00 장치 또는 공구 B60C25/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제 사항 B60C99/00

title.en: Tyres characterised by the chemical composition or the physical arrangement or mixture of the composition

title.ko: 횡단면에 특징이 있는 타이어
title.en: Tyres characterised by transverse section
Closed, e.g. toroidal, tyres

title.ko: 단면의 상대 치수에 특징이 있는 것, 예, 편평 타이어(3/06이 우선)
title.en: characterised by the relative dimensions of the section, e.g. low profile (B60C0003060000 takes precedence)
asymmetric
collapsible into storage or non-use condition, e.g. space-saving spare tyres

title.ko: 팽창가능한 공기타이어 또는 내부튜브(1/00, 9/00부터 17/00이 우선)
title.en: Inflatable pneumatic tyres or inner tubes (B60C0001000000, B60C0009000000-B60C0017000000 take precedence)
without substantial cord reinforcement, e.g. cordless tyres, cast tyres

title.ko: 별개의 팽창할 수 있는 내장물을 갖는 것, 예. 내부튜브를 갖는 것; 윤활유, 통용 타이어 및 내부튜부간의 상대운동 방지용 장치(5/20이 우선)
title.en: having separate inflatable inserts, e.g. with inner tubes; Means for lubricating, venting, preventing relative movement between tyre and inner tube (B60C0005200000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 팽창할 수 있는 내장물의 형상 또는 구조(5/00이 우선)
title.en: Shape or construction of inflatable inserts (B60C0005100000 takes precedence)
having reinforcing means
formed as a single discontinuous ring with contiguous ends which may be connected together

title.ko: 별개의 팽창할 수 있는 내장물을 갖지 않는 것, 예. 림에 대하여 개방하는 횡단면을 가지고 있는 튜브 레스 타이어(5/20이 우선)
title.en: without separate inflatable inserts, e.g. tubeless tyres with transverse section open to the rim (B60C0005200000 takes precedence)
with impervious liner or coating on the inner wall of the tyre
Sealing means between beads and rims, e.g. bands
Sectional casings, e.g. comprising replaceable arcuate parts
having multiple separate inflatable chambers
the chambers being annular
the walls of the chambers extending transversely of the tyre

title.ko: 비팽창성 또는 중실의 타이어(1/00이 우선)
title.en: Non-inflatable or solid tyres (B60C0001000000 takes precedence)
made from ropes or bristles
made of wood or leather
made of metal
built-up from a plurality of arcuate parts
characterised by means for increasing resiliency
using enclosed chambers, e.g. gas-filled
using springs
of helical or flat coil form
disposed radially relative to wheel axis
disposed circumferentially relative to wheel axis
having inlays other than for increasing resiliency, e.g. for armouring
characterised by means for securing tyres on rim or wheel body
using bolts
using straps or the like, e.g. vulcanised into the tyre

title.ko: 공기타이어의 보강재 또는 플라이 배열(보강장치를 갖는 내장물 5/08; 비드 구조, 예. 절반 또는 무거운 구조 15/00)
title.en: Reinforcements or ply arrangement of pneumatic tyres (inserts having reinforcing means B60C0005080000;bead structure, e.g. turnup or overlap construction, B60C0015000000)

definition.ko: 이 그룹내에서 분류할 때는 적층체에서 관련있는 한 서브클래스 B32B 에도 분류된다.

title.ko: 카아카스(Carcass)
title.en: Carcasses

title.ko: 실질적인 평행인 배열로된 각 카아카스 플라이(Carcass ply)의 보강 코드
title.en: the reinforcing cords of each carcass ply arranged in a substantially parallel relationship

title.ko: 각 비드에서 비드까지 경사지게 연장되고 각 연속적인 카아카스 플라이내의 반대방향에 연장되는 것, 즉 바이어스 앵글 플라이(9/07, 9/09가 우선)
title.en: the cords extend diagonally from bead to bead and run in opposite directions in each successive carcass ply, i.e. bias angle ply (B60C0009070000, B60C0009090000 take precedence)
the cords curve from bead to bead in plural planes, e.g. S-shaped cords

title.ko: 비드로부터 비드까지 횡단방향으로 배열된 코드, 즉 래디얼 플라이(radial ply) (9/07이 우선)
title.en: the cords extend transversely from bead to bead, i.e. radial ply (B60C0009070000 takes precedence)
combined with other carcass plies having cords extending diagonally from bead to bead, i.e. combined radial ply and bias angle ply
the reinforcing cords within each carcass ply arranged in a crossing relationship
Woven, braided, or knitted plies
built-up with rubberised layers of discrete fibres or filaments
with two or more differing cord materials
built-up with sheets, webs, or films of homogeneous material, e.g. synthetics, sheet metal, rubber
built-up with metallic reinforcing inlays
asymmetric to the midcircumferential plane of the tyre

title.ko: 벨트 또는 브레이커(braker), 관부의 보강 또는 완충층의 구조 또는 배열
title.en: Structure or arrangement of belts or breakers, crown-reinforcing or cushioning layers
built-up from rubberised plies each having all cords arranged substantially parallel
the plies being arranged with all cords disposed along the circumference of the tyre
built-up of arcuate parts
Folded plies

title.ko: 카아카스에 대한 벨트 또는 브레이커의 치수 또는 곡률에 특징이 있는 것(9/30이 우선)
title.en: characterised by the belt or breaker dimensions or curvature relative to carcass (B60C0009300000 takes precedence)
asymmetric to the midcircumferential plane of the tyre

title.ko: 타이어의 트레드 밴드(tread band) 트레드의 모양 미끄럼 방지용 삽입물
title.en: Tyre tread bands; Tread patterns; Anti-skid inserts
Shape of the shoulders between tread and sidewall, e.g. rounded, stepped or cantilevered
Replaceable treads

title.ko: 트레드의 모양
title.en: Tread patterns

title.ko: 모양의 융기부분이 연속적인 원주방향의 돌기만으로 구성된 것, 예. 지그재그 상(11/12, 11/13이 우선)
title.en: in which the raised area of the pattern consists only of continuous circumferential ribs, e.g. zig-zag (B60C0011120000, B60C0011130000 take precedence)

title.ko: 모양의 융기부분이 분리되는 요소만으로 구성된 것, 예. 블록을 갖는것(11/12, 11/13이 우선)
title.en: in which the raised area of the pattern consists only of isolated elements, e.g. blocks (B60C0011120000, B60C0011130000 take precedence)
in which the raised area of the pattern consists only of projections extending continuously across the tread from one edge to the other

title.ko: 분리된 요부만으로 구성된 것. 즉 홈, 슬롯 또는 구멍(11/12, 11/13이 우선)
title.en: formed only by isolated recesses, e.g. grooves, slots or holes (B60C0011120000, B60C0011130000 take precedence)
characterised by the use of narrow slits or incisions, e.g. sipes
characterised by the groove cross-section, e.g. for buttressing or preventing stone-trapping

title.ko: 미끄럼 방지용 삽입물, 예. 트레드 밴드에 가류한 것
title.en: Anti-skid inserts, e.g. vulcanised into the tread band
of plug form, e.g. made from metal, textile

title.ko: 스트립상의 것, 예. 빗모양의 금쇠붙이, 마모도가 다른 고무제 띠(11/20이 우선)
title.en: or strip form, e.g. metallic combs, rubber strips of different wear resistence (B60C0011200000 takes precedence)
in coiled form
Tread rings between dual tyres
Wear-indicating arrangements

title.ko: 타이어 측벽 그의 보호, 장치, 각인등(17/08이 우선, 타이어견부 11/01; 제거가능한 타이어 측벽 트림 링 B60B 7/01)
title.en: Tyre sidewalls; Protecting, decorating, marking, or the like, thereof (B60C0017080000 takes precedence;tyre shoulders B60C0011010000;removable tyre sidewall trim rings B60B0007010000)
Arrangement of grooves or ribs
having annular inlays or covers, e.g. white sidewalls

title.ko: 타이어의 비드, 예. 플라이 절반 또는 절중
title.en: Tyre beads, e.g. ply turn-up or overlap

title.ko: 림에의 비드의 장착 또는 고착(튜브레스 타이어의 비드와 림간의 밀봉장치 5/16; 림에 대한 중실타이어의 고착장치 7/24)
title.en: Seating or securing beads on rims (sealing means between beads and rims of tubeless tyres B60C0005160000;means for securing solid tyres on rims B60C0007240000)
Bead contour, e.g. lips, grooves, or ribs

title.ko: 비드간 스페이서(긴급하중지지장치 17/00)
title.en: Spacers between beads (emergency load-supporting means B60C0017000000)
inflatable
Tyres permanently fixed to the rim, e.g. by adhesive, by vulcanisation
Bead cores
multiple, i.e. with two or more cores in each bead
Flipper strips, fillers, or chafing strips
Tyres characterised by means enabling restricted operation in damaged or deflated condition; Accessories therefor
utilising additional inflatable supports which become load-supporting in emergency
inflated or expanded in emergency only
utilising additional non-inflatable supports which become load-supporting in emergency
resilient
Means facilitating folding of sidewalls, e.g. run-flat sidewalls
Internal lubrication
Tyre parts or constructions not otherwise provided for
Tyre with openings closeable by means other than the rim; Closing means therefor
Electric-charge-dissipating arrangements
Puncture preventing arrangements

Devices for measuring, signalling, controlling, or distributing tyre pressure or temperature, specially adapted for mounting on vehicles; Arrangement of tyre inflating devices on vehicles, e.g. of pumps or of tanks; Tyre cooling arrangements
Signalling devices actuated by tyre pressure
mounted on the wheel or tyre
Signalling devices actuated by deformation of the tyre
by touching the ground
Arrangement of tyre-inflating pumps mounted on vehicles
operated by a running wheel
operated by the prime mover of the vehicle
Arrangement of air tanks mounted on vehicles
Tyre cooling arrangements
for dissipating heat
Devices for measuring or signalling tyre temperature

title.ko: 타이어의 부착, 떼어내기, 검사 또는 수리를 위한 장치 또는 공구(타이어 테스트 G01M17/02)
title.en: Apparatus or tools adapted for mounting, removing or inspecting tyres (testing of tyres G01M0017020000)

title.ko: 차륜에 타이어를 설치하거나 제거하기 위한 것
title.en: for removing tyres from, or mounting tyres on, wheels
Tyre levers or the like, e.g. hand-held
pivotal about the wheel axis, or movable along the rim edge, e.g. rollable

title.ko: 기계
title.en: Machines
for only seating the beads
acting on the tyre tread
for only breaking the beads
acting axially on the whole circumference of the bead or side wall
acting axially at localised regions of the bead or side wall

title.ko: 타이어를 설치. 제거하기 위한 것(단지 비드를 장착하기 위한 것 25/12; 단지 비드를 단절하기 위한 것 25/125)
title.en: for removing and mounting tyres (for only seating the beads B60C0025120000;for only breaking the beads B60C0025125000)
having a tyre support or a tool, movable along wheel axis
with rotary motion of tool or tyre support

title.ko: 타이어 비드를 확장시키기 위한 장치 또는 공구(25/12 우선)
title.en: Apparatus or tools for spreading tyre beads (B60C0025120000 takes precedence)
with means for inverting the tyre
Tools for mounting or demounting air valves
Tools for attaching metallic tyres, e.g. iron tyres upon wooden rims

title.ko: 탄성타이어 또는 탄성타이어를 갖는 차축에 일시적으로 설치가능한 미끄럼 방지장치
title.en: Non-skid devices temporarily attachable to resilient tyres or resiliently-tyred wheels

title.ko: 트레드의 활모양의 부재에 한정하여 확장하는 것(27/20이 우선)
title.en: extending over restricted arcuate part of tread (B60C0027200000 takes precedence)
the ground-engaging part being rigid

title.ko: 트레드의 전 둘레에 걸쳐 확장하는 것, 예. 쇠사슬제의 것(27/20이 우선)
title.en: extending over the complete circumference of tread, e.g. made of chains (B60C0027200000 takes precedence)
involving lugs or rings taking up wear
having tensioning means
resilient
automatically attachable
formed of close material, e.g. leather
the material being fabric, e.g. woven wire
having ground-engaging plate-like elements
for tandem tyres

title.ko: 타이어 또는 림에 타이어 팽창 밸브의 배치; 타이어 팽창 밸브용 부속품, 달리 분류되지 않는 것 (밸브를 장착 또는 탈착하기 위한 공구 B60C25/18)
title.en: Arrangements of tyre-inflating valves to tyres or rims; Accessories for tyre-inflating valves, not otherwise provided for (tools for mounting or demounting valves B60C0025180000)
Connection to rims
Connection to tyres
Accessories for tyre-inflating valves, e.g. housings, guards, covers for valve caps, locks, not otherwise provided for
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
